dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal detects divergence between price and momentum (MACD). Entry conditions check for opposite directional movement: LONG when price declines but MACD histogram is positive (bullish divergence); SHORT when price rises but MACD histogram is negative (bearish divergence). Exit conditions reverse when momentum direction changes. MACD_hist used as primary momentum indicator per allowed indicators list.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal detects divergence between price and momentum (MACD). Entry conditions check for opposite directional movement: LONG when price declines but MACD histogram is positive (bullish divergence); SHORT when price rises but MACD histogram is negative (bearish divergence). Exit conditions reverse when momentum direction changes. MACD_hist used as primary momentum indicator per allowed indicators list.

source_rule_text: When prices and a momentum indicator diverge in direction over the same time interval, expect prices to follow the direction of momentum.
